'''âng-t-m''' ('''kangatam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anhydrate|anhydrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anhydrate|anhydrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-t-m
|-
! Lemma
| kangatam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingatam|thingatam]] || [[word:jingatam|jingatam]] || [[word:shingatam|shingatam]] || [[word:kingatam|kingatam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungatam|thuthungatam]] || [[word:jujungatam|jujungatam]] || [[word:shushungatam|shushungatam]] || [[word:kukungatam|kukungatam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungatam|thungatam]] || [[word:jungatam|jungatam]] || [[word:shungatam|shungatam]] || [[word:kungatam|kungatam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungatam|thungatam]] || [[word:jungatam|jungatam]] || [[word:shungatam|shungatam]] || [[word:kungatam|kungatam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengatam|thengatam]] || [[word:jengatam|jengatam]] || [[word:shengatam|shengatam]] || [[word:kengatam|kengatam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongatam|thothongatam]] || [[word:jojongatam|jojongatam]] || [[word:shoshongatam|shoshongatam]] || [[word:kokongatam|kokongatam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongatam|thongatam]] || [[word:jongatam|jongatam]] || [[word:shongatam|shongatam]] || [[word:kongatam|kongatam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongatam|thongatam]] || [[word:jongatam|jongatam]] || [[word:shongatam|shongatam]] || [[word:kongatam|kongatam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngatam|thĂŠngatam]] || [[word:jĂŠngatam|jĂŠngatam]] || [[word:shĂŠngatam|shĂŠngatam]] || [[word:kĂŠngatam|kĂŠngatam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangatam|thathangatam]] || [[word:jajangatam|jajangatam]] || [[word:shashangatam|shashangatam]] || [[word:kakangatam|kakangatam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangatam|thangatam]] || [[word:jangatam|jangatam]] || [[word:shangatam|shangatam]] || [[word:kangatam|kangatam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangatam|thangatam]] || [[word:jangatam|jangatam]] || [[word:shangatam|shangatam]] || [[word:kangatam|kangatam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangatam|shangatam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangatam|goshangatam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangatam|gokishangatam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangatamnĂŒ|shangatamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangatamnknĂŒ|goshangatamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangatamnĂŒ|gokishangatamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangatamshĂ«|shangatamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangatamnkshĂ«|goshangatamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangatamshĂ«|gokishangatamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangatamro|shangatamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangatamnkro|goshangatamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangatamro|gokishangatamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangatamu|shangatamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangatamnkmu|goshangatamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangatamu|gokishangatamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangatamsher|shangatamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangatamnksher|goshangatamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangatamsher|gokishangatamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangatamng|shangatamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangatamnkng|goshangatamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangatamng|gokishangatamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangatamya|shangatamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangatamnkya|goshangatamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangatamya|gokishangatamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangatamyam|shangatamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangatamnkyam|goshangatamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangatamyam|gokishangatamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangatamnĂŒshĂ«|shangatamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangatamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangatamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangatamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangatamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangatamnĂŒro|shangatamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangatamnknĂŒro|goshangatamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangatamnĂŒro|gokishangatamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangatamnĂŒmu|shangatamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangatamnknĂŒmu|goshangatamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangatamnĂŒmu|gokishangatamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangatamshĂ«nĂŒ|shangatamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangatamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangatamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangatamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangatamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangatamshĂ«ro|shangatamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangatamnkshĂ«ro|goshangatamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangatamshĂ«ro|gokishangatamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangatamshĂ«mu|shangatamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangatamnkshĂ«mu|goshangatamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangatamshĂ«mu|gokishangatamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangatamronĂŒ|shangatamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangatamnkronĂŒ|goshangatamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangatamronĂŒ|gokishangatamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangatamroshĂ«|shangatamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangatamnkroshĂ«|goshangatamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangatamroshĂ«|gokishangatamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangatamromu|shangatamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangatamnkromu|goshangatamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangatamromu|gokishangatamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangatamunĂŒ|shangatamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangatamnkmunĂŒ|goshangatamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangatamunĂŒ|gokishangatamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangatamushĂ«|shangatamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangatamnkmushĂ«|goshangatamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangatamushĂ«|gokishangatamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangatamuro|shangatamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangatamnkmuro|goshangatamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangatamuro|gokishangatamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
